project.title: Lead Discovery Service
project.description: Finds business leads in a chosen geographic area: takes a query, walks a third-party listings provider and persists deduplicated, enriched lead records.

flow.title: Discovery & Enrichment Flow
flow.description: A search query is queued; a worker harvests listings through a rotating proxy pool; each listing is deduplicated and enriched before being persisted for API access.

domains.name: Harvest
domains.description: Workers, proxy pool and the third-party listings provider.

domains.name: Leads Data
domains.description: Deduped, enriched leads and their location metadata.

steps.title: Submit Query
steps.description: Authenticated client submits a query (industry + geographic area). API key is checked.

steps.title: Job Queue
steps.description: Buffers pending searches so the harvester can scale horizontally.

steps.title: Harvest Worker
steps.description: Picks a job, walks the listings provider through pagination, throttled by the proxy pool.

steps.title: Proxy Pool
steps.description: Rotates outbound IPs so the provider doesn't rate-limit a single source.

steps.title: Listings Provider
steps.description: Third-party business directory the harvester queries.

steps.title: Dedupe & Enrich
steps.description: Drops listings we already have, normalises addresses and phone numbers, attaches a location fingerprint.

steps.title: Lead Store
steps.description: Canonical store of leads. Indexed by location and query so the API can serve filtered slices.

steps.title: Leads API
steps.description: Read API serving filtered lead lists back to the client.
